sections.title: And
sections.content:
**And** = add things together:
• I like tea **and** coffee.
• She works **and** studies.

sections.title: But
sections.content:
**But** = show a difference:
• I like tea **but** I don't like coffee.
• He is tired **but** he is happy.

sections.title: Or
sections.content:
**Or** = give a choice:
• Do you want tea **or** coffee?
• We can go now **or** later.

sections.title: Because
sections.content:
**Because** = give a reason:
• I am happy **because** it is my birthday.
• She is tired **because** she worked all day.

questions.question: I like tea _____ I don't like coffee.
She is sad _____ her cat is ill.
I have a dog _____ a cat.
He is old _____ he is very fit.
We stayed at home _____ it was raining.
